prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约11158名、11958名、10502名、11989名、12163名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021→2022后移约800名，2023年回升至10502名后 再度后移，2024→2025年从11989名小幅后移至12163名，近两年累计后移约1660名，2025年基准位次约12163名；该校在甘肃省理科/物理类招生计划逐年递增：2 021年42人、2022年42人、2023年43人、2024年48人、2025年51人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划增至59人，较2025年扩招约15.7%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。 中国矿业大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第76名左右（2021年第69名、2022年第77名、2023年第76名、2024年第77名 、2025年第76名、2026年第76名），属于中上水平211院校，办学层次稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情事件；2022年曾有一次师德 师风相关负面事件（教师与学生不正当关系受处分），但已过去多年，影响消退；抖音平台热度一般，未进入高热榜单；无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期平稳；安全科学与工程为A+学科（全国顶尖），测绘科学与技术为A-，土木工程为A-；矿业工程、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势领域。安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木工程 等招生专业直接对应A类学科，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术、人工智能等专业社会热度高热推荐，报考竞争持续升温；安全科学与工程类（A+）为特色王牌，关注度较高；土木建筑类整体热度分化观望。甘肃省2026年物理类考生数预计约14.6万人（按近年占比估算），较2025年12.1万人增长约 20%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；学校位于北京市，对甘肃考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在甘肃招生计划逐年递增，2026年计划5 9人，占比较往年有所提升，但考生增幅更大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招（+15.7%）与甘肃省物理类考生数显著增长（+20%）的供 需博弈，扩招缓解效应略不及考生增量带来的竞争加剧；加之电气、计算机等热门专业持续高热，安全工程A+学科吸引力强，预计2026年最低位次较2025年基准小幅前移（竞争略 加剧）。预测最低位次约13258名，波动区间12758–13758名。

二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约13258名，区间12758–13758名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档专业为主攻方向（安全科学与工程类A+学科性价比极高，新能源、机械类、数学类均为稳健选择 ），一档专业（电气、计算机、人工智能）可作为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（<12758名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次在区间中后段（约13500名以后）建议以三档专 业保底，优先选择土木工程（A-学科）或智能建造等新兴方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 11158, 11958, 10502, 11989, and 12163 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, it shifted back by about 800 places; after rebounding to 10502 in 2023, it shifted back again; from 2024 to 2025, it slightly shifted back from 11989 to 12163, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1660 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12163. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Gansu Province has been increasing year by year: 42 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 51 in 2025. In 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), the plan is to increase to 59, an expansion of about 15.7% compared to 2025, which significantly alleviates competitive pressure. China University of Mining and Technology (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has been stable around 76th in recent years (69th in 2021, 77th in 2022, 76th in 2023, 77th in 2024, 76th in 2025, and 76th in 2026), indicating a mid-to-upper level 211 institution with a stable academic level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents. In 2022, there was a negative incident related to teacher ethics (a teacher was disciplined for an improper relationship with a student), but it has been several years and the impact has faded. The popularity on Douyin platform is average, not entering the high-heat list. There is no record of a cutoff line collapse or sharp drop, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable. Safety Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-. Mining Engineering and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering are traditional advantageous fields. Majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering directly correspond to A-level disciplines, which strongly attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, and Artificial Intelligence are highly recommended with high social heat, and competition for admission continues to heat up. Safety Science and Engineering (A+) is a characteristic trump card with high attention. The overall heat for Civil and Architecture majors is polarized and wait-and-see. The number of physics category candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is estimated to be about 146,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), an increase of about 20% compared to 121,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expansion of the candidate pool. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu has been increasing year by year, with a plan of 59 in 2026, accounting for a higher proportion than previous years, but the increase in candidates is even greater.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+15.7%), and the substantial increase in physics category candidates in Gansu Province (+20%), the alleviation effect of expansion is slightly less than the intensified competition caused by the increase in candidates. Additionally, popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science remain highly sought after, and the A+ Safety Engineering discipline is strongly attractive. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13258, with a fluctuation range of 12758 to 13758.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Urban Underground Space Engineering
- Intelligent Construction
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Mining Engineering

- Mineral Processing Engineering
- Geology (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Big Data Management and Application)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 13258, with a range of 12758 to 13758. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction (Safety Science and Engineering A+ discipline offers excellent value for money; New Energy, Mechanical, and Mathematics are all stable choices). Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence) can be targeted as stretch goals. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<12758) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates with rankings in the middle to back end of the range (around 13500 and above) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, prioritizing Civil Engineering (A- discipline) or emerging directions like Intelligent Construction.
